metadata.appDescription: Appointment and queue management for clinics
metadata.bookingDescription: Book your clinic appointment in seconds

metadata.title: Nawah — Clinic operations that stay calm
metadata.description: Nawah helps clinic owners organize scheduling, reception flow, patient records, payments, and ready-to-send WhatsApp follow-ups — without chaos.

hero.badge: Built for clinic owners and doctors
hero.headline: Your clinic, finally under control.
hero.subheadline: Scheduling, reception, records, and payments in one calm system — so you practice medicine, not firefighting.
hero.ctaSecondary: See how a clinic day flows

showcase.ariaLabel: Interactive product preview of Nawah clinic operations
showcase.title: Morning operations

chaos.title: The day starts in chaos before the first patient arrives.
chaos.subtitle: Phones, paper, and waiting rooms pull attention away from care. Reception absorbs the pressure. Revenue quietly slips.

phones.title: The phone never stops
phones.body: Bookings, confirmations, and late changes compete for the same overloaded desk.

paper.title: Paper files slow everything
paper.body: Finding a history, balance, or follow-up becomes a hunt instead of a glance.

waiting.title: Patients wait without clarity
waiting.body: Nobody sees the live floor clearly — so frustration grows in the waiting room.

exhaustion.title: The doctor carries the load
exhaustion.body: Clinical work is interrupted by operational decisions that never needed a physician.

outcomes.title: Less management. More medicine.
outcomes.subtitle: Nawah is designed around the outcome doctors actually want: a clinic that runs without constant rescue.
outcomes.waiting: Reduce patient waiting with a clearer live floor.
outcomes.followups: Never lose track of follow-up patients.
outcomes.status: Know today's clinic status in seconds.
outcomes.efficiency: Increase clinic efficiency without adding more admin work.

beforeAfter.title: Traditional clinic vs clinic running Nawah
beforeAfter.subtitle: Same doctor. Same patients. A completely different day.

before.crowd: Crowded waiting room with no clear order
before.confused: Confused receptionist juggling tools and memory
before.cash: Cash confusion after the visit ends
before.stress: Reception stress from juggling tools and memory

after.reminders: Ready-to-send WhatsApp reminders from one place
after.records: Instant medical records during the visit
after.flow: Smooth patient flow from arrival to payment
after.focus: Doctor focused on treatment, not logistics
after.digital: Digital workflow from booking to payment
after.reception: Fast reception with a live patient floor
after.visibility: Complete visibility for the doctor in seconds

features.title: Every capability starts with a clinic problem.
features.subtitle: Problem. How Nawah solves it. Business impact — with the interface your team will actually use.

booking.title: Never lose another appointment because scheduling and reminders stay connected.
booking.problem: Patients book through chaotic phone calls.
booking.solution: A clinic-specific booking page with real availability.
booking.result: Reception starts the day with a cleaner schedule.

queue.title: Know who is waiting, who is inside, and what comes next.
queue.problem: Nobody sees the live floor clearly.
queue.solution: Outside, waiting, and doctor zones with status control.

records.title: Open a complete patient story in seconds.
records.problem: History is fragmented across notes, phones, and folders.
records.solution: Profiles, visits, family links, and prescriptions in one place.
records.result: Consultations start with context, not searching.

payments.title: Keep collections visible after the visit ends.
payments.solution: Track dues, record payments, and issue receipts.

whatsapp.title: Send clearer reminders without rewriting every message.
whatsapp.problem: Follow-up messages take too long under pressure.
whatsapp.solution: Prefill appointment, balance, and recall messages.
whatsapp.result: Staff communicate faster — without a CRM tax.

visual.title: Present progress with clinical clarity.
visual.problem: Before/after progress is hard to show cleanly.
visual.solution: Visual EHR media with private presentation tools.
visual.result: Consultations feel clearer and more professional.

insights.title: What the doctor sees before the day begins.
insights.subtitle: A calm operational briefing — not another noisy dashboard.
insights.previewNote: Preview mock values for storytelling. Not live clinic data.
insights.ariaLabel: Animated mock morning insights for a clinic

tour.title: From booking to follow-up — one connected day.
tour.subtitle: Each step is visible to the team that needs it. Nothing depends on a sticky note.

book.title: Patient books online
book.body: The patient chooses a service and available slot on your public booking page.

receive.title: Reception receives booking
receive.body: The appointment lands in the clinic schedule without rewriting it by hand.

arrive.title: Patient arrives & check-in
arrive.body: Reception moves the patient onto the live floor and keeps status clear.

consult.title: Doctor consultation
consult.body: The visit opens with context ready — history, notes, and plan in one place.

prescribe.title: Prescription
prescribe.body: Write and store the prescription with the patient record.

pay.title: Payment
pay.body: Record what was paid, what remains, and issue a receipt.

followup.title: Automatic follow-up path
followup.body: Plan the next visit and prepare a WhatsApp reminder when needed.

proof.title: Built for clinics that need calm reliability.
proof.subtitle: Clear operational depth, bilingual by design, and security practices that belong in a medical workflow.

lifecycle.label: Appointment states
lifecycle.detail: From pending to completed, including no-show and cancel flows.

locales.label: Languages
locales.detail: Arabic and English for staff and public booking.

plans.label: Free trial window
plans.detail: Start with a full six-month free plan and no credit card.

modules.label: Operational surfaces
modules.detail: Booking, queue, agenda, patients, finance, inventory, and more.

uptime.label: Availability target
uptime.detail: Cloud-hosted clinic operations meant to stay reachable through the day.

trial.label: Free start
trial.detail: Six months free, no credit card required.

quote1.body: Reception finally stopped living inside phone calls and paper notes.
quote1.name: Dr. Hana

quote2.body: I open the morning view and know the day before the first patient arrives.
quote2.name: Dr. Karim

quote3.body: Follow-ups used to disappear. Now the next visit is part of the workflow.
quote3.name: Lina A.

proof.logosNote: Clinic logo wall coming as design partners go live.

pricing.title: Start free. Scale when the clinic is ready.
pricing.subtitle: Same core clinic capabilities on both plans. Choose onboarding support when you want guided setup.

free.name: Free plan
free.description: Launch your clinic workspace and run the full day-to-day flow without paying upfront.

paid.name: Clinic plan
paid.description: Same clinic capabilities with white-glove onboarding for teams that want help getting live fast.

pricing.benefit3: Patient records, visits, and visual EHR

comparison.title: Plan comparison
comparison.subtitle: Commercial terms differ. Core clinic capabilities are shared.
comparison.note: Both plans include the shipped clinic operations suite. Paid adds guided onboarding support.

confidence.title: Start free. Decide with real clinic days behind you.
confidence.body: Six months on the free plan, no credit card, and the same core clinic capabilities. Upgrade for guided onboarding when you want help getting live faster.

faq.title: Pricing FAQ
faq.subtitle: Clear answers before you create your clinic workspace.

whatIncluded.question: What does Nawah manage today?
whatIncluded.answer: Scheduling, public booking, live reception flow, patient records, follow-ups, payments, receipts, inventory alerts, visual EHR, and ready-to-send WhatsApp messages.

setup.question: How fast can we start?
setup.answer: Create your clinic workspace, add services, and share your booking link. The free plan needs no credit card.

locales.question: Is Nawah available in Arabic and English?
locales.answer: Yes. Staff and public booking experiences support Arabic and English.

booking.question: Do patients need an app?
booking.answer: No. Patients book through your clinic-specific web page.

whatsapp.question: Does Nawah send WhatsApp automatically?
whatsapp.answer: No. Nawah prepares ready-to-send WhatsApp messages. Staff review and send them from WhatsApp.

afterPlan.question: What happens after I choose a plan?
afterPlan.answer: You register, create the clinic workspace, and land in the dashboard ready to configure services and start the day.

finalCta.headline: Your clinic deserves software that works as hard as you do.
finalCta.subheadline: Start free for six months. Bring order to reception, schedule, and follow-up — without adding more noise.

footer.tagline: Clinic operations for doctors who want calm days

why.title: Less noise. More medicine.
why.subtitle: Private clinics switch when operations stop stealing attention from care.

admin.title: Less administrative work
admin.body: Reception stops rewriting schedules by hand. The day stays visible without constant check-ins.

wait.title: Shorter patient waiting
wait.body: A live floor shows who is outside, waiting, or with the doctor — so flow stays intentional.

retention.title: Higher patient retention
retention.body: Follow-ups and ready-to-send reminders keep returning patients from quietly disappearing.

organization.title: Better clinic organization
organization.body: Booking, queue, records, and payments share one operating rhythm instead of five disconnected tools.

records.title: The full patient story — without the paper chase.
records.subtitle: Timeline, labs, imaging, files, media, and prescriptions in one elegant clinical surface.

timeline.title: Patient timeline
timeline.body: Previous visits and clinical notes in order.

labs.title: Lab results
labs.body: Keep laboratory context beside the visit.

imaging.title: Radiology
imaging.body: Imaging linked to the patient record.

rx.title: Prescriptions
rx.body: Draft, save, and keep medication history with the record.

automation.title: The work that should not wait for someone to remember.
automation.subtitle: Nawah prepares the messages and follow-ups your clinic already intends to send.

confirm.title: WhatsApp confirmation
confirm.body: Confirm bookings without rewriting the same message.

birthday.title: Birthday messages
birthday.body: Keep a warm retention touchpoint ready when you need it.

followup.title: Follow-up reminders
followup.body: Surface patients who need the next visit scheduled.

noshow.title: Missed appointment recovery
noshow.body: Reclaim empty slots before the revenue quietly leaves.

payment.title: Payment reminders
payment.body: Prepare balance follow-ups without hunting through notebooks.

roi.title: See what calmer operations can recover.
roi.subtitle: Adjust the sliders to your clinic. The math updates live.
roi.disclaimer: Illustrative model for planning conversations — not a financial guarantee.

branding.headline: The management system trusted by elite dental, dermatology, and mental health practices.
branding.subheadline: From the discipline engine to visual EHR — one platform for scheduling, collections, and patient communication.
branding.proofCaption: Based on clinics using WhatsApp reminders and one-tap confirmations.

I need access to a page in our Nawah clinic dashboard that I cannot open (403).

Please grant the appropriate role or permission.

Thanks.
